data.body: LANDED: change 557 submitted -> MERGED (FF-only). origin/main now includes the subtree-aware close-gate fix. Ticket 1edf CLOSED + signed (completion-verifier). DONE: completion-verifier referencing-commit precheck now credits a parent's entire descendant subtree; the force-close that was needed for epic 2fd4 is no longer necessary for future container parents.
